---
title: "Alin Mechenici — Founder & CEO, chen.ist"
title-block-style: none
description: "Alin Mechenici — Founder & CEO of chen.ist. Cybersecurity practitioner, entrepreneur, and educator based in Gothenburg, Sweden. 15+ years across cybersecurity, DevOps, and digitisation."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://chen.ist/alinmechenici/">
        <meta property="og:title" content="Alin Mechenici — Founder & CEO, chen.ist">
        <meta property="og:description" content="Cybersecurity practitioner and entrepreneur. 15+ years in cybersecurity, DevOps, and digitisation across Europe.">
        <meta property="og:type" content="profile">
        <meta property="og:url" content="https://chen.ist/alinmechenici/">
        <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .am-hero { min-height: 78vh; }
  .am-hero-content { max-width: 900px; }
  .am-hero-tag { letter-spacing: 0.12em; }
  .am-links { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:1.75rem; }
  .am-links a {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;
    padding: 0.55rem 1rem; border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color:#fff;
    text-decoration:none; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    transition: background .2s ease, transform .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;
  }
  .am-links a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .am-links a i { font-size: 1rem; }

  .am-tl { position:relative; padding-left: 2rem; border-left: 2px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.25); }
  .am-tl-item { position:relative; padding-bottom: 2.25rem; }
  .am-tl-item:last-child { padding-bottom: 0; }
  .am-tl-item::before {
    content:""; position:absolute; left:-2.35rem; top:0.35rem;
    width:12px; height:12px; border-radius:50%;
    background: var(--c, #81BD4A); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(129,189,74,0.15);
  }
  .am-tl-period { font-size:0.8rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color: var(--c, #81BD4A); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.2rem; }
  .am-tl-role { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 0.15rem 0; }
  .am-tl-org { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-tl-org { color: #9ca3af; }
  .am-tl-body { margin: 0; }

  .am-skills { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; }
  .am-skill { padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.18); }
  .am-skill h4 { font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color: var(--c, #81BD4A); margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; font-weight:700; }
  .am-skill p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; }

  .am-quote {
    border-left: 3px solid var(--c, #81BD4A);
    padding: 0.25rem 0 0.25rem 1.25rem;
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-style: italic; line-height:1.5;
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
  }

  .am-lang { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem; margin-top:0.75rem; }
  .am-lang span {
    font-size: 0.82rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(127,127,127,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.2);
  }

  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .am-hero { min-height: 60vh; }
  }
</style>

<div class="m" style="--c:#81BD4A;">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero am-hero">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content am-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag am-hero-tag">chen.ist · Founder & CEO</div>
    <h1>Alin Mechenici</h1>
    <p>Entrepreneur and cybersecurity practitioner building secure platforms, strong teams, and healthy cultures across Europe.</p>
    <div class="am-links">
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/alinmechenici" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/alinmechenici" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/about" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Substack</a>
      <a href="https://about.me/alinmechenici" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> about.me</a>
      <a href="/booking/"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i> Book a call</a>
      <a href="/assets/files/alin-mechenici-cv-en.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> CV (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- QUICK FACTS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Years in tech</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">3</div><div class="m-nl">Companies founded</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2</div><div class="m-nl">NGOs bootstrapped</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2</div><div class="m-nl">Countries · RO · SE</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROFILE -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Alin Mechenici — Founder & CEO of chen.ist"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <p style="color:var(--c); font-weight:600; font-size:0.85rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i> Gothenburg, Sweden
        </p>
        <h2>Secure platforms.<br>Strong teams.<br>Healthy cultures.</h2>
        <p>I'm Alin — founder of <a href="/">chen.ist</a>, a European cybersecurity and digital infrastructure consultancy. Over the last 15+ years I've combined PR/CSR, IT, cybersecurity and project management across Romania and Sweden — bootstrapping two NGOs and three companies along the way.</p>
        <p>At chen.ist I lead three divisions: <strong>Academy &amp; Club</strong> (training, talent, open-source), <strong>Digital</strong> (software &amp; infrastructure), and <strong>Cybersecurity</strong> (architecture, hardening, IAM, DLP, cyber-hygiene). My focus is helping digital businesses become resilient — prevention, detection, response, and recovery for business continuity.</p>
        <div class="am-quote">"Build for sovereignty. Choose open. Teach what you know."</div>
        <div class="am-lang">
          <span>🇷🇴 Romanian · Native</span>
          <span>🇬🇧 English · Professional</span>
          <span>🇸🇪 Swedish · Limited working</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EXPERTISE -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Areas of expertise</h2>
    <p class="sub">Hands-on practice across the full stack of European digital resilience.</p>
    <div class="am-skills" style="margin-top:2rem;">
      <div class="am-skill"><h4>Cybersecurity</h4><p>OS hardening · air-gap networking · OpenBSD/FreeBSD · IAM · DLP · privacy &amp; anonymity · security-by-design · cyber-hygiene &amp; awareness training.</p></div>
      <div class="am-skill"><h4>DevOps & Cloud</h4><p>Ansible · WireGuard · PfSense · TrueNAS · NixOS · Debian/RHEL · Linux security &amp; hardening · distributed architectures · cloud management.</p></div>
      <div class="am-skill"><h4>Software</h4><p>Python automation · front-end development · open-source platforms · Neo4j / graph databases · data visualisation · Emacs / Org-mode.</p></div>
      <div class="am-skill"><h4>Leadership</h4><p>Bootstrapping · team &amp; culture building · Train the Trainers · strategic PR planning · project management · community building.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Experience</h2>
    <p class="sub">13+ years running companies at the intersection of tech, training, and communications.</p>
    <div style="max-width: 820px; margin: 3rem auto 0;">
      <div class="am-tl">
        <div class="am-tl-item">
          <div class="am-tl-period">Sep 2019 — Present · Europe</div>
          <h3 class="am-tl-role">Founder</h3>
          <div class="am-tl-org">CHENIST Cybersecurity</div>
          <p class="am-tl-body">Helping digital businesses become resilient — prevention, detection, response and recovery for business continuity. Infrastructure solutions, distributed architectures, cloud management and end-to-end cybersecurity from design through training. Three divisions: Academy &amp; Club, Digital, Cybersecurity.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="am-tl-item">
          <div class="am-tl-period">Jan 2013 — Sep 2019 · Linköping, Sweden</div>
          <h3 class="am-tl-role">Founder</h3>
          <div class="am-tl-org">Highway to Business</div>
          <p class="am-tl-body">Bespoke digital solutions for Scandinavian SMEs: IT consultancy, data protection, project management, training and technical support. Organised four editions of the NASA Space Apps Challenge and co-hosted a podcast with Mjärdevi Science Park clients and friends.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="am-tl-item">
          <div class="am-tl-period">Apr 2007 — Mar 2013 · Romania</div>
          <h3 class="am-tl-role">Founder</h3>
          <div class="am-tl-org">PR Patrat Digital Solutions</div>
          <p class="am-tl-body">Digital services company; flagship cloud products were an event-management system and an online learning platform serving medical, education, corporate, SME and NGO sectors. Coordinated a 20+ person technical team for Heineken Romania, mentored 15 startups, and trained hundreds of professionals across 20+ cities.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="am-tl-item">
          <div class="am-tl-period">Jan 2010 — Dec 2012 · Romania</div>
          <h3 class="am-tl-role">Trainer & Consultant</h3>
          <div class="am-tl-org">Dental Management</div>
          <p class="am-tl-body">Marketing and management consulting for Romania's first dental-consulting firm (Medical Tours Company, Platinum Dent, Super Dent, Dentcof, Royal Dental). In parallel co-founded Teddy Care in Pitești — the city's first paediatric dental company — as Managing Partner.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="am-tl-item">
          <div class="am-tl-period">Sep 2004 — Dec 2006 · Romania</div>
          <h3 class="am-tl-role">Public Relations Officer</h3>
          <div class="am-tl-org">AIESEC</div>
          <p class="am-tl-body">PR &amp; media relations, project management, community building, design, video, photo and audio editing.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROJECTS & VOLUNTEERING -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Selected projects & volunteering</h2>
    <p class="sub">Communities, media, and global hackathons.</p>
    <div class="row g-4" style="margin-top:2rem;">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="NASA Space Apps Challenge">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <h3>NASA Space Apps Challenge</h3>
            <p style="color:var(--c); font-weight:600; font-size:0.78rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em;">Lead Organiser · 2016 — 2026</p>
            <p>Five editions of the 48-hour global hackathon in Linköping and Craiova — open-source solutions for life on Earth and in space.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.webp" alt="JCI Craiova">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <h3>JCI Craiova</h3>
            <p style="color:var(--c); font-weight:600; font-size:0.78rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em;">Founder & President · 2011 — 2013</p>
            <p>Founded the Junior Chamber International chapter in Craiova (15–20 active members) — business conferences, meetups and events including BNE and TEDx.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="ON/OFF Newsletter & Podcast">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <h3>ON/OFF — Newsletter & Podcast</h3>
            <p style="color:var(--c); font-weight:600; font-size:0.78rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em;">Author & Host · 2024 — Present</p>
            <p>AI-free newsletter and podcast on business, cybersecurity, open-source and motorcycle culture. Weekly trainer at CHENIST Academy.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Education & continuous learning"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Education &<br>continuous learning.</h2>
        <p><strong>SNSPA</strong> — Political &amp; Administrative Studies, Bucharest (2005 — 2009).</p>
        <p style="color:var(--c); font-weight:600; font-size:0.85rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; margin-top:1.5rem;">Selected courses</p>
        <p>Linux Security &amp; Hardening · Debian Hardening · RHEL · OpenBSD · NixOS · FreeBSD · PfSense · WireGuard · TrueNAS · Ansible · Python automation · Neo4j · Data Visualisation · DLP · Cyber Awareness · Strategic PR (Achelis &amp; Partner) · Train the Trainers (AIESEC + Dale Carnegie) · CSR Academy (JCI) · Leadership Academy (JCI).</p>
        <div class="lk" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
          <a href="/assets/files/alin-mechenici-cv-en.pdf" target="_blank" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download CV (EN)</a>
          &nbsp;&nbsp;
          <a href="/assets/files/alin-mechenici-cv-se.pdf" target="_blank" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> CV (SV)</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Let's talk.</h2>
    <p>Cybersecurity, resilient infrastructure, training, or just a conversation about building in Europe — I'm always happy to meet.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Book a call</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/alinmechenici" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="m-bo"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> Connect on LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Based in Gothenburg &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Serving EU-wide &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Open-source first
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
